applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: ttnn.heaviside(input_tensor, value=value); constraints: {'scalar_arg': 'value must be a host-side scalar; the torch.tensor(value) second operand of torch.heaviside must be 0-dim/broadcast scalar to map onto ttnn.heaviside', 'fusion_note': 'fusable as unary eltwise; eligible for unary op-chain fusion with adjacent eltwise ops'}
